page.title: Preventive Maintenance Strategies

fields.title: Title
fields.taskContentPlaceholder:
One step per line, for example:
Inspect belts
Check lubrication
Tighten terminals

newPlan.title: Create PM plan
newPlan.description: Create a governed PM strategy with lifecycle controls.

newVersion.title: Create PM version
newVersion.description: Draft a new version before publishing it.

editVersion.title: Edit PM version
editVersion.description: Only draft versions can be edited.

execution.title: Log PM execution
execution.description: Capture completion outcome, findings, and follow-up routing.

deletePlan.title: Delete PM plan
deletePlan.description: Delete plan {{code}}? This action is permanent and allowed only for draft plans without versions.

deleteVersion.title: Delete PM version
deleteVersion.description: Delete version v{{version}}? This action is permanent and allowed only for draft versions.

guidance.activationTitle: How to make this plan active
guidance.activationPath: Use lifecycle steps in order: draft -> proposed -> approved -> active. A draft plan will not drive active PM operations.
guidance.alreadyOperational: Already active or beyond activation path

empty.noPlanSelected: Select a PM plan to view and manage versions.
empty.noPlansMatch: No plans match the current search/filter.

hints.publishBlockedByLifecycle: To publish this draft version, first set plan status to approved, active, or suspended.
hints.publishDraftOnly: Publish is available only for draft versions.
hints.editVersionDraftOnly: Edit is available only for draft versions.
hints.deletePlanDraftOnly: Delete is available only for draft plans.
hints.deleteVersionDraftOnly: Delete is available only for draft versions.
hints.lifecycleAction: This updates the plan status (lifecycle). Status controls what actions are allowed, including version publishing.
hints.touchAction: Refresh plan snapshot saves the current plan record (updated date + row version) without changing business data.
hints.generationNeedPlan: Select a plan first, then generate forecast occurrences.
hints.generationNeedLifecycle: Generation works when the selected plan is active and in lifecycle active or suspended.
hints.generationNeedVersion: Publish at least one version before generation.
hints.generationReady: Generation is ready: click Generate Planning to create due occurrences.
hints.occurrenceSameStatus: Choose a different status before applying transition.

messages.generationNoNew: Generation completed: no new occurrences were created for current inputs.

errors.taskListNameRequired: Please provide a task list name before saving to references.
